title: Destruction of the Death Star (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:Exds.png|thumb|right|250px|The destruction of the first Death Star]]
'''Destruction of the Death Star''' could refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Battle of Yavin]]''', where the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station|Death Star I]] was destroyed.
*The '''[[Battle of Endor]]''', where the [[DS-2 Death Star II Mobile Battle Station|Death Star II]] was destroyed.

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]''', where the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]] was destroyed.
*The '''[[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]''', where the [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star II]] was destroyed.
*The '''[[Battle of the Maw]]''', where the [[Death Star prototype]] was destroyed.
*'''[[Death Star Destruction]]''', a type of energy drink.

==See also==
*The destruction of the [[Death Star/Legends|Death Star]]-like [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapons]] [[Darksaber (superweapon)|Darksaber]] and [[Tarkin (superweapon)|''Tarkin'']].
{{Disambig}}
